item.title: Fed cuts interest rates by 25bp, signals further easing
item.description: The Federal Reserve cut its benchmark interest rate by 25 basis points on Wednesday, the first move since the pivot earlier this year, citing softening labor markets and easing inflation. Small business lending conditions are expected to improve.

item.title: SBA loan approvals climb 18% in Q1 amid easier credit
item.description: Small Business Administration loan approvals jumped 18% year-over-year in the first quarter, driven by improved working capital demand and steady SMB confidence.

item.title: Quarterly earnings: Tech giant posts record buyback
item.description: A large-cap tech company announced a $90B buyback program alongside its quarterly results.

item.title: Old news from last year about cash flow management
item.description: An evergreen piece on cash flow management for small business owners. Contains business credit and working capital advice.
